title: INDI Q2 2024 Earnings Report
text: Indie Semiconductor released its Q2 2024 earnings report with mixed results. The company achieved its earnings target but fell short on revenue. EPS: -9 cents (met analyst estimate). Revenue: $52.36 million, representing a 2.50% shortfall against expectations of $53.70 million. The company continues to miss on revenue guidance while meeting on EPS projections during this period of pre-profitability.
